data.title: Microservices
data.description: Instagram uses a microservices architecture to scale and manage different features independently.
data.technical_spec: Each feature such as messaging or image processing is a separate service.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Utilizes load balancers to ensure efficient traffic distribution across servers.
data.technical_spec: Employs hardware and software load balancers to manage incoming user requests.

data.title: CDN Use
data.description: Uses a Content Delivery Network to improve content delivery speeds worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Caches static content close to end-users to reduce latency.

data.title: Sharded Database
data.description: Employs sharded databases to manage and scale user data efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Splits databases by user or feature to distribute load.

data.title: RESTful API
data.description: Exposes services through RESTful APIs for internal and external access.
data.technical_spec: Stateless interactions with standard HTTP methods for CRUD operations.
